Iron arrows

Iron arrows
Type: Material
Value: 1
Fine Value: 11
Keyword: Arrows
Search
Keyword: 		Hunting
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

The staple arrows of many ranged military units.

The Iron arrows item is a material.

Requirement

  • At least Hunting lvl. 20.

Attributes (Input)

Quality Attributes

+20% Work efficiency While doing Hunting.

Global +40% Work efficiency
+20% Work efficiency While doing Hunting.
Global +200% Fine material finding
Global +10% Double rewards
Global +100% Bonus experience

Uses

Activity Input

Iron arrows can be used as an input for the following activities:

Activity Name Locations Requirements Note
Bear hunting Nomad Woods in Jarvonia Needs 1x Hunting level 20 Arrows This activity gains extra benefits from using fine material inputs.
Deer hunting Mangrove Forest in GDTE Needs 1x Arrows This activity gains extra benefits from using fine material inputs.
Ectoplasm slime hunting Wraithwater in Wallisia Needs 1x Arrows This activity gains extra benefits from using fine material inputs.
Lizard hunting Old Arena Ruins in GDTE Needs 1x Arrows This activity gains extra benefits from using fine material inputs.
Squirrel hunting Nomad Woods in Jarvonia Needs 1x Arrows This activity gains extra benefits from using fine material inputs.
Wolf hunting Sanguine Hills in Jarvonia Needs 1x Arrows This activity gains extra benefits from using fine material inputs.

Sources

Chest Drops

Chest Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest)† 		Odds
Hunting chest 3-10 5.304% 19.587% ~1 in 5

†Note: Chests roll for loot multiple times.

Primary Recipe Output

Fletch iron arrows

You heat the iron in the fire, then shape it into arrowheads with steady hands. Once cooled, you attach the feathered shafts, creating simple yet effective weapons.

Craft sturdy projectiles tipped with iron.

Recipe Outputs
Recipe Name Level Service
Requirement 		Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Fletch iron arrows Carpentry lvl. 22 Needs Basic Sawmill service or better. 1x Iron bar
1x Spruce logs
5x Feather		 5x Iron arrows

Recipe Name Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Minimum
Steps 		Max
Work Efficiency 		Max
XP/Step 		Full Recipe
W.E.A.R.

Rate 		W.E.A.R.
